title: Senior Teacher - Sri Chaitanya - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Sri Chaitanya - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Join the Sri Chaitanya family as a Senior Teacher in Gurgaon. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Sri Chaitanya:
Sri Chaitanya is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sri Chaitanya!
